name: Toro Energy Limited
content: Toro Energy Limited is an Australian-based uranium exploration and development company primarily focused on its flagship Wiluna Uranium Project in Western Australia. The project consists of several deposits, including Centipede, Millipede, Lake Maitland, and Lake Way, making it one of the most advanced uranium projects in the region. In addition to its uranium assets, the company explores for nickel, gold, and base metals through its Dusty Nickel Project and other regional exploration programs. Toro Energy aims to become a significant uranium producer to support the global transition toward clean energy and nuclear power.
